title: Common Document Envelope
description: Shared envelope for typed docs. When non_parsed_raw_markdown is empty, raw_markdown is omitted (structured fields are sufficient). When non_parsed_raw_markdown is non-empty, raw_markdown must hold the full source for gap reconciliation.

schema_version.description: JSON schema version; increment when envelope fields change

kind.description: Content kind; determines which kind-specific schema applies

source_path.description: Relative path of the source .md file from docs/

sha256_source.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the original markdown file

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when this JSON was generated

title.description: Document title extracted from the first # heading

raw_markdown.description: Full original markdown (UTF-8). Required only when non_parsed_raw_markdown is non-empty; omitted when the heuristic found no gaps.

non_parsed_raw_markdown.description: Heuristic gap capture: always includes YAML front matter when present; body is line- and fenced-code–aware, compared to structured fields via substring, heading/title match, and token-overlap thresholds (adaptive 0.86–0.97). If estimated unparsed body would exceed ~35% of full raw length, body gaps are omitted so this field does not duplicate most of raw_markdown.
